Home Privacy Policy
Privacy

Privacy Policy.

Last updated: June 27, 2026

Information We Collect

When you use the contact form or newsletter signup on this website, we collect the information you provide — such as your name, email address, company name, and message content. This data is used solely to respond to your inquiry.

We do not collect browsing data, cookies, or any tracking information. This website does not use analytics, tracking scripts, or third-party cookies.

How We Use Your Data

Your information is used only for the purpose you provided it:

  • To respond to your contact or project inquiry
  • To send you information you explicitly requested

We will never sell, share, or rent your personal data to third parties.

Data Retention

We retain your inquiry data for as long as necessary to fulfill your request. If you wish to have your data removed, contact us at kritrajnexera@gmail.com and we will delete it promptly.

Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Request access to your personal data
  • Request correction or deletion of your data
  • Withdraw consent at any time

To exercise any of these rights, email kritrajnexera@gmail.com.

Third-Party Services

This website is hosted on a static server. No third-party services process your data beyond standard network routing.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. The latest version will always be published on this page with the updated date.

Contact

If you have questions about this policy, reach out at kritrajnexera@gmail.com.
